case_title: CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA) N.A. VS. GALINA ZAKHARTCHOUK

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP 395 (B); VENUE FOR PERSONAL, FAMILY OR HOUSEHOLD OBLIGATIONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA) N.A.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA) N.A. SERVED APR-20-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ZAKHARTCHOUK, GALINA

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA) N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT ZAKHARTCHOUK, GALINA SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-08-2009
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $250.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT ZAKHARTCHOUK, GALINA
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF: 1. DEFAULT JUDGMENT (CCP 585); 2. COPIES IN LIEU OF ORIGINALS (EVID 1550); 3. ATTORNEY'S FEES & COSTS (CCP 1033) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA) N.A.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA) N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZAKHARTCHOUK, GALINA $6,210.07 PRINCIPAL, $250.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,460.07, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
